word: G1999 - ἐπισύστασις - episýstasis - ep-ee-soo'-stas-is - That which cometh upon

sections.paragraph:
ἐπισύστασις - episustasis - ep-ee-soo'-stas-is

From the middle of a compound of G1909 and G4921; a conspiracy, that is, concourse (riotous or friendly): - that which cometh upon, + raising up.
